head.hi: The Greek Minister (Simopoulos) to the Acting Secretary of State

div.p: The Minister of Greece presents his compliments to His Excellency the Acting Secretary of State and, referring to his note of May 4, 1932,Not printed. and to his conversations with officials of the Department of State and Treasury Department, has the honor to inform him that it is understood that if, after the signature by Greece of the agreement concerning the postponement of payments due during the fiscal year of 1936 and their repayment over a 10 year period, more favorable terms should have been granted to other governments, included in the Joint Resolution of Congress approved December 23, 1931, these should be extended also to the Greek Government.
